description_long: This lamp features a large, cylindrical fabric lampshade with a marbled black and white texture, giving it a modern and slightly industrial appearance. The shade is open at the top and bottom, revealing a single, central light bulb housed within a smooth, white socket. The lamp stands on three slender, angled legs, likely made of metal, which provide stability and a contemporary tripod design. A visible power cord and switch dangle beneath the shade, indicating its electric operation and ease of use. The overall construction suggests a sturdy yet lightweight build, suitable for urban interiors or modern public spaces. The lamp's design is both functional and decorative, with its textured shade serving as the primary visual accent.
description: A modern tripod floor lamp with a marbled black and white cylindrical fabric shade and a single exposed bulb. The lamp stands on three angled metal legs and features a visible power cord and switch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marbled cylindrical shade, central bulb, and tripod legs with the power cord and switch visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the angled legs and the marbled texture of the shade, with the bulb still visible inside.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the shade and the tripod leg arrangement, with the bulb partially visible.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the depth of the shade, the tripod base, and the hanging power cord and switch.
